description: Public claims registry for f7-platform/public-docs. Maps each public-facing claim to its source evidence, audit references, and current release status. Used by scripts/check-public-claims.sh and reviewed each release cycle.

evidence: fseven-agent: agent-core/src/event_log.rs — activity/event metadata structures
fseven-controller: server/src/services/ingestion.rs — telemetry ingestion uses structured activity fields

claims.summary: EdDSA-signed device JWTs with per-device credentials
evidence: fseven-controller: server/src/auth/jwt.rs — EdDSA-signed agent access tokens
fseven-controller: server/src/auth/tokens.rs — per-device credentials are generated and Argon2id-verified
fseven-agent: agent-core/src/auth.rs — agent stores device credential and refresh/access-token lifecycle
fseven-controller: server/src/auth/tokens.rs — argon2 crate, Argon2 credential hashing and verification

claims.summary: TLS 1.3 with HSTS and certificate pinning for agent connections
evidence: fseven-controller: server/src/middleware/security.rs — HSTS header
fseven-agent: agent-core/src/config_poller/security.rs — pinned HTTP client and TLS configuration
fseven-controller: openfga/ — authorization model
fseven-controller: server/src/auth/authorization.rs — policy enforcement and obligations
fseven-controller: server/src/middleware/obligations.rs — k-anonymity threshold enforcement

claims.summary: SOC 2 Type II controls implemented — independent audit planned
evidence: content/compliance/soc2.md — controls mapped to trust service criteria
NOTE: Independent audit has not yet been completed — page states 'planned'
claims.notes: Page correctly scopes this as 'controls implemented; audit planned'. Do not promote to 'certified' until report is in hand.

evidence: public-agent-binaries/LICENSE — MIT
fseven-agent/LICENSE — see repo

claims.summary: Personal behavioral data visible to individual employee on personal dashboard
claims.notes: FORBIDDEN CLAIM: personal-dashboard feature is not yet shipped. This claim must never appear in public-docs. Checked by scripts/check-public-claims.sh.

claims.summary: Implemented third-party event integration provider scope
evidence: fseven-controller: server/src/integrations/models.rs — implemented event/webhook source enum
public-docs: content/privacy/data-collection.md — public provider list scoped to implemented event/webhook sources
claims.notes: Do not add AI/productivity/writing/dev-tool API provider examples unless the controller integration model implements them.

claims.summary: Mode 3 frames stay local and current macOS capture streams PNG bytes through stdout
evidence: fseven-agent: agent-core/src/lifecycle/vision_capture.rs — macOS screencapture uses stdout and startup scrub removes stale legacy temp files
public-docs: content/privacy/data-collection.md — discloses local-only processing plus stdout capture behavior
public-docs: content/legal/privacy-policy.md — discloses startup scrub for stale legacy vision temp files
claims.notes: Current source uses screencapture stdout on macOS and retains stale legacy temp-file scrub for crash leftovers from older builds.

claims.summary: Trust Center dependency audit runs before GitHub Pages publication
evidence: public-docs: .github/workflows/deploy.yml — runs npm audit --audit-level=moderate before claim checks and build
public-docs: scripts/check-public-claims.sh — rejects overbroad every-commit/every-code-change dependency-audit claims
claims.notes: This claim is scoped to the public-docs Trust Center deploy workflow; product dependency evidence is release-scoped in owning repos.
